VitePress

Appearance

OpenSIN DocumentationAI that works. Not just talks.

The first Agent-to-Agent network — 100+ autonomous AI agents in 18 specialized teams. Build, deploy, and scale with A2A protocol.

Get Started
View on GitHub

A2A Protocol

Agent-to-Agent communication standard enabling 100+ autonomous agents to collaborate, delegate, and deliver results without human intervention.

18 Specialized Teams

From Software Engineering to Bug Bounty, Google Apps to DevOps — each team is purpose-built for specific domains with deep expertise.

Model-Agnostic

Works with 1000+ models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, Groq, Ollama and more. Bring your own API keys or use free tier.

Security by Design

Auth-Broker, Secret-Authority, Approval-Lanes. No secrets in code. Every critical action can be reviewed before execution.

Omni-Channel

WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, iMessage, Apple Notes — your agents are everywhere you are, responding in your name.

Open Source

Fully forkable, self-hostable, and extensible. Apache 2.0 licensed. No vendor lock-in, no hidden costs.

Quick Start ​

bash
# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN.git
cd OpenSIN

# Install and start
pip install opensin-cli
opensin agent create researcher --model gpt-4
opensin agent test researcher --prompt "What is AI?"

Why OpenSIN? ​

FeatureOpenSINHermes-AgentOpenClawChatGPTClaude
Multi-Agent System✅ Native⚠️ Dispatcher⚠️ Limited❌ Single❌ Single
A2A Communication✅ Built-in⚠️ Basic❌ None❌ None❌ None
Self-Hostable✅ Yes✅ Yes✅ Yes❌ Cloud❌ Cloud
Open Source✅ Apache 2.0✅ Partial✅ Partial❌ Proprietary❌ Proprietary
Model-Agnostic✅ 1000+⚠️ Limited✅ Multiple❌ GPT only❌ Claude only
Web Automation✅ Stealth❌ None✅ Basic❌ None❌ None
Omni-Channel✅ 6+⚠️ Telegram⚠️ Telegram❌ Web only❌ Web only
Enterprise Security✅ Full⚠️ Basic❌ None✅ Basic✅ Basic
Cost✅ Free✅ Free✅ Free💰 $20/mo💰 $20/mo
